title: SugarCraft — CandyFuzzy
description: CandyFuzzy: Fuzzy string matching with scored matched indices — Smith-Waterman + Sahilm algorithms. Extracted from candy-forms; unblocks filter-highlighting UI across the ecosystem.
ogDescription: Fuzzy string matcher that returns which characters matched and their score. Two algorithms: Smith-Waterman (local alignment) and Sahilm (gum-style). Enables filter-highlighting UIs impossible with score-only matchers.
tagline: Fuzzy string matching with scored matched indices
